{{CargoRelic
|name=Traveler Manual
|class_id=20513
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=10-02
|source=Finish Traveler tasks (Tutorial)
|description=On Oct 2, 2119 AD, Earth's Will wrote this manual after confirming the Traveler's plan.<br>After losing the final battle against the Demon Gods, Earth's Will knew that the time machine was their only chance to turn the tide. Send travelers back to the past and finish Demon Gods while they were weak - this is the Traveler's Plan! To increase the rate of success, Earth's Will wrote this manual to help the new travelers. Though filled with sarcasm, this manual played an important part in ensuring the survival of the travelers!
|fame=20
|art=26
|fth=31
|civ=46
|tech=31
|ss1=In explorations, INTEL gained +0.6%
|ss2=In explorations, INTEL gained +1.2%
|ss3=In explorations, INTEL gained +1.8%
|ss4=In explorations, INTEL gained +3%
|ss7=In explorations, INTEL gained +3%<br>In explorations, INTEL gained +3% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Fungusfarm skill I.png|50px]]Place in Fungus Farm: Fungus Output +5%
}}
